tool.name: CleaveRNA
tool.description: scoring candidate cleavage sites of DNAzyme
tool.command:
#if $mode_selector.mode == "training" #set $model_name = $mode_selector.model_name cleaverna --params "$mode_selector.params_csv" --target_files_training $mode_selector.target_files_training --prediction_mode default --model_name "$model_name" --output_dir output #else ## ---------- PREDICTION MODE ---------- #if $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.prediction_mode == "default" ## PARAMS #set $params_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.params_csv ## training file #if $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_file_method == "builtin" #set $training_file = "$__tool_directory__/data/" + $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_builtin #else #set $training_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_upload #end if ## training scores #if $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_method == "builtin" #set $training_scores = "$__tool_directory__/data/" + $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_builtin #else #set $training_scores = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_upload #end if cleaverna \ --prediction_mode default \ --params "$params_file" \ --model_name "$mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.model_name" \ #for $f in $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.target_files_prediction --target_files_prediction "$f" \ #end for --training_file "$training_file"/*.csv \ --training_scores "$training_scores" \ --output_dir . #elif $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.prediction_mode == "target_check" ## params (multi-row repeat) #set $params_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.params_csv ## training file #if $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_file_method == "builtin" #set $training_file = "$__tool_directory__/data/" + $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_builtin #else #set $training_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_upload #end if
## training scores #if $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_method == "builtin" #set $training_scores = "$__tool_directory__/data/" + $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_builtin #else #set $training_scores = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_upload #end if
## RUN cleaverna \ --prediction_mode target_check \ --params "$params_file" \ --model_name "$mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.model_name" \ #for $f in $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.target_files_prediction --target_files_prediction "$f" \ #end for --training_file "$training_file"/*.csv \ --training_scores "$training_scores" \ --output_dir . #elif $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.prediction_mode == "target_screen" ## params #set $params_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.params_csv ## training file #if str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_file_method) == "builtin" #set $training_file = $__tool_directory__ + "/data/" + str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_builtin) #else #set $training_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_upload #end if ## training scores #if str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_method) == "builtin" #set $training_scores = $__tool_directory__ + "/data/" + str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_builtin) #else #set $training_scores = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_upload #end if cleaverna \ --prediction_mode target_screen \ --params "$params_file" \ --model_name "$mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.model_name" \ #for $f in $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.target_files_prediction --target_files_prediction "$f" \ #end for --training_file "$training_file"/*.csv \ --training_scores "$training_scores" \ --output_dir . ## Specific_query #elif $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.prediction_mode == "specific_query" ## params #set $params_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.params_csv ## training file #if str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_file_method) == "builtin" #set $training_file = $__tool_directory__ + "/data/" + str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_builtin) #else #set $training_file = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_file_source.training_upload #end if ## training scores #if str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_method) == "builtin" #set $training_scores = $__tool_directory__ + "/data/" + str($mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_builtin) #else #set $training_scores = $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.training_scores_source.scores_upload #end if cleaverna \ --prediction_mode specific_query \ --params "$params_file" \ --model_name "$mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.model_name" \ #for $f in $mode_selector.prediction_mode_selector.target_files_prediction --target_files_prediction "$f" \ #end for --training_file "$training_file"/*.csv \ --training_scores "$training_scores" \ --output_dir . #end if #end if
tool.help:
This tool performs DNAzyme cleavage site prediction on RNA sequences using machine learning models. It supports both training and prediction modes with customizable parameters for DNAzyme analysis.
**Training Mode:** - Input RNA sequences in FASTA format. - Generate training feature matrices based on specified DNAzyme parameters. - Output training features for model development.
**Prediction Mode:** - Input RNA sequences in FASTA format. - Choose from multiple analysis modes: Default, Target Check, Target Screen, and Specific Query. - Customize DNAzyme parameters or upload parameter files for feature generation. - Output cleavage site predictions along with machine learning metrics.
For detailed instructions and parameter descriptions, please refer to the tool documentation.
